source_name: A6 image-level injection-recovery baseline (synthetic moving-source injections through the real detect/link/classify/score chain)
instrument: synthesized 63x63 difference-image cutouts (Gaussian PSF + Gaussian background noise + trail elongation), not a real telescope
cadence: n/a -- synthetic injections use an arbitrary night-bucketing reference epoch (JD 2460000.5, per Skills/injection_recovery.py `jd_base = 2460000.5 + night`); this is not a real observation campaign date range
band_or_frequency: synthetic (no real filter band; analytic peak-SNR-derived real_bogus proxy)
data_product_type: injection-recovery-curves-v1 report: detection/link/score outcomes and per-bin recovery curves across magnitude, velocity, observation count, night count, seeing, background, and trail-length dimensions
license: n/a -- entirely synthetic, locally generated data. No third-party source.
label_source: synthetic; ground truth is the injection generator's own known parameters (magnitude, velocity, seeing, background, trail length)
preprocessing_version: Skills/injection_recovery.py --image-level --n-inject 200 --seed 42, regenerable via the documented command in docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md's A6 entry
known_caveats: Real result: 7.5% detection/link/score rate (n=200, seed=42); all five required A6 recovery-curve dimensions (magnitude, velocity, observation count, night count, seeing/background/trail length) are covered with non-degenerate per-bin curves.

This is synthetic data, not real observations -- it demonstrates pipeline mechanics and sensitivity, not real-world detection performance. Do not cite this dataset as real-world recall/purity evidence.

This is real evidence closing A6 (2026-07-09); it is now also cited by the A5 frozen canonical eval suite's `injection_recovery` case and by the A7 promotion report's derived injection-recovery-report input (Skills/extract_promotion_evidence.py).
